title: Set up auto-sort
intro: Auto-sort keeps your collection ordered by what actually sells — no manual reordering. This takes about a minute.

steps.heading: Open Sort rules
steps.body: In the admin sidebar, open **Sort rules**, then choose a **Sort strategy**. *Best sellers* ranks products by units sold.

els.text: Pick a Sort strategy — Best sellers ranks by units sold.

notes.text: Set update frequency to Live so ranking refreshes as orders come in.

steps.heading: Watch the collection re-rank
steps.body: Back on the collection, top sellers automatically float to the top. The badge shows each product's live rank.

els.text: Products re-rank live by sales — #1 is your best seller.
